description: STING Seed Tag v5.6 — master label specification with enriched warnings (99 thresholds, all columns populated)

Compact.description: Basic identification — tag code + type name only

Technical.description: Engineering documentation — key properties + threshold warnings

Full_Specification.description: Complete specification — all tiers + paragraph + warnings

Presentation.description: Client presentation — clean tags without warning text

BOQ.description: Bill of Quantities — identity + quantities for cost schedules

cv_show_tier2.name: Show Tier 2
cv_show_tier2.description: Gates tier 2 parameters — visible when Standard or above

cv_show_tier3.name: Show Tier 3
cv_show_tier3.description: Gates tier 3 parameters — visible when Comprehensive

cv_show_warning.name: Show Warning
cv_show_warning.description: Gates warning text — visible when warnings enabled

parameter_text._comment: Global prefix/suffix definitions. These are the 'scheduled text words' for Edit Label.

ASS_TAG_2_TXT.label: Short Tag (FUNC-PROD-SEQ)
ASS_TAG_2_TXT.note: Heading line in TAG7 — underlined in State 2, bold+underlined in State 3. Style controlled via batch command.

parameter_text._paragraph_comment: TAG7 paragraph containers — tier_3 natural-language specification paragraphs. No prefix/suffix needed as content is a pre-assembled descriptive statement from the formula engine.

tier_2.note: Short tag heading (FUNC-PROD-SEQ) — underlined in family

tier_3.note: Short tag heading (FUNC-PROD-SEQ) — bold underlined in family
Natural language paragraph — purely descriptive, no technical codes

Casework.paragraph_template: This {type} casework unit is {width} mm wide by {depth} mm deep by {height} mm high, constructed from {material}. Countertop: {countertop}. Hardware: {hardware}. Accessible: {accessible} (clearance: {clearance} mm). Located in {room} on level {level} in the {zone} zone, serving the {department} department. Manufacturer: {manufacturer}, Model: {model}. Expected life: {life} years. Assembly code: {assembly_code}. Compliant with {standard}.

Ceilings.paragraph_template: This ceiling is finished with {material} at a height of {height} mm above finished floor level, covering an area of {area} m². Fire resistance: {FRR} minutes. Acoustic absorption coefficient: {NRC}. The ceiling system is {suspension_type} with {access} access. Located in {room} ({room_number}) on level {level} in the {zone} zone, serving the {department} department. Assembly code: {assembly_code}. Manufacturer: {manufacturer}. Phase: {phase}. Maintenance: {maint_freq}. Compliant with {standard}.

warnings.description: VOC emissions limit for indoor air quality

Doors.paragraph_template: This is a {width} by {height} millimetre {operation} door constructed from {material}, providing a clear opening width of {clear_width} mm for accessibility compliance. It provides {FRR} minutes of fire resistance and achieves an acoustic insulation rating of {STC} dB. The door is located in {room} ({room_number}) on level {level} within the {zone} zone, serving the {department} department. The door hardware includes {ironmongery} and the door is {glazed}. Security rating: {security}. Assembly code: {assembly_code}. Manufacturer: {manufacturer}, Model: {model}. Expected life: {life} years, maintenance frequency: {maint_freq}. Phase: {phase}. Keynote: {keynote}. Compliant with {standard}.

Floors.paragraph_template: This {function} floor is {thickness} mm thick covering an area of {area} m², constructed with {material} using {method} construction. The floor achieves a thermal transmittance of {U-value} W/m²K and provides {FRR} minutes of fire resistance with an impact insulation class of {IIC} dB. The imposed load capacity is {load} kPa. Located on level {level} in {room}, {zone} zone. Embodied carbon: {carbon} kgCO₂e, recyclability: {recycle}%. Structural type: {struct_type}. Assembly code: {assembly_code}. Phase: {phase}. Maintenance: {maint_freq}. Compliant with {standard}.

Rooms.paragraph_template: This is {room_name} (Room {room_number}) with a floor area of {area} m² and volume of {volume} m³, located on level {level} in the {zone} zone within the {department} department. The room has a ceiling height of {height} mm with {finishes} finishes. Design lighting level: {lux} lux. Ventilation rate: {ventilation} L/s per person. The stair is constructed from {material} with {nosing} nosing detail. Handrail height: {handrail_height} mm. Fire resistance: {FRR} minutes. Walls.paragraph_template: This {function} wall is {thickness} mm thick and {height} mm high with a total length of {length} mm, constructed using {method} with {material} as the primary material. The wall is classified as {type} under the {assembly_code} Uniformat classification, and achieves a thermal transmittance of {U-value} W/m²K with a thermal resistance of {R-value} m²K/W, assessed as {condensation} condensation risk. It provides {FRR} minutes of fire resistance with an acoustic rating of {STC} dB STC. The assembly incorporates {recycled}% recycled content with an embodied carbon of {carbon} kgCO₂e per unit and an expected service life of {life} years. It is situated in {room} on level {level} within the {zone} zone. The wall was created during the {phase} phase under {workset} workset. Manufacturer: {manufacturer}, Model: {model}. Maintenance frequency: {maint_freq}. Compliant with {standard}.

tag7_heading_style._comment: Controls the visual formatting of the TAG7 short tag heading (ASS_TAG_2_TXT) in both tier_2 and tier_3. These settings are applied at the tag family label level in Revit Family Editor.

tier_2_heading.note: Underlined in State 2 (Technical) — functional emphasis without visual dominance

tier_3_heading.note: Bold + Underlined in State 3 (Full Specification) — primary heading treatment

batch_control.description: Use the Set TAG7 Heading Style command to batch-update the heading format across all tag families. Supported styles: bold, italic, underline, bold+underline, bold+italic, all.
batch_control.applies_to: ASS_TAG_2_TXT label row in all STING tag families
